metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills and plugins.

plugins.name: crap-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze recently-changed code for Change Risk Anti-Patterns. Multi-language (TS/JS, Python, Java, Kotlin, Go, Ruby, C#, Rust, PHP) with auto-discovered coverage toolchain.

plugins.name: zenify-my-terminal
plugins.description: Set up a fast, calm, focused terminal on macOS. Two modes — guided (walks through every choice between WezTerm/Ghostty/Alacritty/Kitty/iTerm2/Apple Terminal, Starship/Oh My Posh, plugins, optional extras) or fast-track (zero questions, applies the opinionated stack: WezTerm + Oh My Posh `pure` + zinit turbo + git/sudo/aws/kubectl + project switcher over ~/projects + viddy + lazygit + status bar). Writes configs with macOS gotchas already handled. Ends with a keyboard-shortcuts cheat-sheet.
